description: Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.

userStories.title: Add task status schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to store a status value for each task so that task states can be persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Status column added to tasks table

userStories.title: Add backend action for task status update
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a backend action to update task status so that UI can persist changes.

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current status as a badge on task cards so that I know the task state at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can update progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list has a control to change status
Status change is saved to backend
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list has a status filter dropdown or tabs
List updates when filter is applied
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
